title: Top US counterterrorism official resigns over Iran war, urging Trump to 'reverse course'
summary: National Counterterrorism Center Director Joe Kent says Trump "started this war due to pressure from Israel and its powerful American lobby".

title: How World ID wants to put a unique human identity on every AI agent
summary: Iris-scan backed tokens could help stop agent swarms from overwhelming online systems.

title: Iran launches retaliatory strikes on Israel and U.S. assets after security chief Larijani is killed
summary: Iran has intensified attacks targeting U.S. assets in the Middle East and Israel in apparent retaliation against the killing of Iran's security chief Ali Larijani.

title: ‘We’ll be doing something with Cuba very soon’, Trump says
summary: While waging war on Iran, the US president and his secretary of state are demanding a leadership change in Cuba.

title: Trump postpones trip to Beijing as Iran war delays China reset - Reuters
summary: Trump postpones trip to Beijing as Iran war delays China reset  Reuters
